summary: While the role aligns with your strength in procedural, protocol-driven work, the combination of poor work-life balance and high burnout risk makes this career path unsustainable for a wellbeing-focused candidate. The requirement for mandatory night shifts and rotating weekends directly conflicts with your need for predictable hours and personal stability. Furthermore, the extreme physical toll and high-stress environment present significant risks to your long-term health and professional longevity.
